mapper.select:
SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, QUIZ_IDX, QUIZ_TYPE, QUIZ_NAME, QUIZ_YEAR, QUIZ_MONTH, BOOK_NAME, BOOK_AUTHOR, BOOK_PUBLISHER, CALL_NO, BOOK_DESC, QUIZ_START_DATE, QUIZ_END_DATE, IMG_FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE, TOP_HTML, BOTTOM_HTML, DELETE_YN, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QUIZ_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND QUIZ_IDX = a.QUIZ_IDX) AS QUIZ_REQ_COUNT, QUIZ_RESULT_DATE, BOOK_LINK, QUIZ_NOTICE FROM QUIZ a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
ORDER BY QUIZ_IDX DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QUIZ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'

SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, QUIZ_IDX, QUIZ_TYPE, QUIZ_NAME, QUIZ_YEAR, QUIZ_MONTH, BOOK_NAME, BOOK_AUTHOR, BOOK_PUBLISHER, CALL_NO, BOOK_DESC, QUIZ_START_DATE, QUIZ_END_DATE, IMG_FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE, TOP_HTML, BOTTOM_HTML, DELETE_YN, ADD_DATE, ADD_ID, MOD_DATE, MOD_ID, SCHOOL_YN, BAN_YN, HAK_YN, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QUIZ_REQ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = a.HOMEPAGE_ID AND QUIZ_IDX = a.QUIZ_IDX) AS QUIZ_REQ_COUNT, SELECT_CNT, QUIZ_RESULT_DATE, BOOK_LINK, QUIZ_NOTICE FROM QUIZ a WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND QUIZ_IDX = #{quiz_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.update:
UPDATE QUIZ SET QUIZ_NAME = #{quiz_name}, QUIZ_YEAR = #{quiz_year}, QUIZ_MONTH = #{quiz_month}, QUIZ_TYPE = #{quiz_type}, BOOK_NAME = #{book_name}, BOOK_AUTHOR = #{book_author}, BOOK_PUBLISHER = #{book_publisher}, CALL_NO = #{call_no}, BOOK_DESC = #{book_desc}, QUIZ_START_DATE = #{quiz_start_date}, QUIZ_END_DATE = #{quiz_end_date},
IMG_FILE_NAME = #{img_file_name}, REAL_FILE_NAME = #{real_file_name}, FILE_EXTENSION = #{file_extension}, FILE_SIZE = #{file_size},
TOP_HTML = #{top_html}, BOTTOM_HTML = #{bottom_html}, MOD_DATE = SYSDATE, MOD_ID = #{mod_id}, SCHOOL_YN = #{school_yn}, BAN_YN = #{ban_yn}, HAK_YN = #{hak_yn}, QUIZ_RESULT_DATE= #{quiz_result_date}, BOOK_LINK = #{book_link}, QUIZ_NOTICE = #{quiz_notice} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND QUIZ_IDX = #{quiz_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM QUIZ WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND QUIZ_IDX = #{quiz_idx} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND QUIZ_START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') <= QUIZ_END_DATE
